title: NeurIPS 2026 Paper PDF Compilation with Ablation & Routing Integration
summary: Demo notebook that loads pre-computed evaluation results from a NeurIPS 2026 paper PDF compilation pipeline. It analyzes 9 figures for quality (file size, NeurIPS dimension compliance), reproduces the ablation decomposition bar chart showing CSD feature contributions (F1 scores from 0.509 baseline to 0.949 full model), computes compilation metrics (14 pages, 5 tables, 40 bib entries, zero missing citations), and produces a 4-panel visualization dashboard covering figure sizes, dimensions, quality scorecard, and data point distribution. Uses the full evaluation dataset (10 examples across 2 datasets: figure_quality and compilation_summary).
